# Samaris OS Support

Welcome to Samaris OS! This page outlines how to get help and support.

## Documentation

Visit the official Samaris OS website at [samaris.tech](https://samaris.tech) for documentation, guides, and reference materials.

## Issue Tracker

- **Bug Reports:** Use the [Bug Report](https://github.com/khalidbentaieb/Samaris-OS/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) template.
- **Feature Requests:** Use the [Feature Request](https://github.com/khalidbentaieb/Samaris-OS/issues/new?template=feature_request.md) template.
- **Documentation Issues:** Use the [Documentation](https://github.com/khalidbentaieb/Samaris-OS/issues/new?template=documentation.md) template.

Before opening a new issue, please search the existing issues to avoid duplicates.

## Contact

- **Maintainer:** Khaled Ben Taieb
- **Email:** contact.samaris.os@gmail.com
- **Website:** [samaris.tech](https://samaris.tech)

For private or sensitive inquiries, please use email.

## Contributing

Interested in contributing? See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidelines on how to get involved.
